events.agenda: Single-speaker session on preparing raw data for AI and machine learning using dbt.
events.event_description: AI is only as powerful as the data behind it. In this session, you'll discover how dbt (data build tool) helps teams clean, transform, and structure raw data—turning it into a solid foundation for machine learning and advanced analytics.
events.event_name: Raw to Ready: Getting Your Data AI-Ready with dbt
events.location: theBUNKer Uyo, 32 B G Bassey Ave, Uyo
events.raw_text:
Sat, May 17, 2025 · 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM GMT+1

Guest Speaker: Chima Caleb – Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientist. How dbt helps teams clean, transform, and structure raw data for ML and advanced analytics.

talks.description: How dbt helps teams turn messy data into clean, AI-ready datasets, building a blueprint for robust data models and integrating dbt with machine learning workflows.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🎙️ Guest Speaker: Chima Caleb – Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientist. Whether you're into Data Engineering, Data Science, or ML, this event will give you the tools to take your data from raw to ready.
talks.title: Raw to Ready: Getting Your Data AI-Ready with dbt

events.agenda: Monthly meetup format with engaging discussions and hands-on workshops on dbt best practices.
events.event_description: Are you passionate about leveraging data to drive insights and decisions within your organization? Join us for our monthly dbt meetup where data enthusiasts come together to explore, learn, and collaborate on all things related to dbt and modern data analytics practices.
events.event_name: Building your first dbt model: zero to hero
events.location: theBUNKer Uyo, 32 B G Bassey Ave, Uyo
events.raw_text:
Sat, Feb 17, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM GMT+1

Engaging discussions on best practices, tips, and tricks for using dbt in real-world scenarios; hands-on workshops and tutorials to deepen understanding of dbt and related technologies.

talks.description: A hands-on workshop and discussion on best practices, tips, and tricks for building your first dbt model, from zero to hero.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Engaging discussions on best practices, tips, and tricks for using dbt in real-world scenarios. Hands-on workshops and tutorials to deepen your understanding of dbt and related technologies.
talks.title: Building Your First dbt Model: Zero to Hero

events.agenda: 12:00-12:30 Check-in/Registration; 12:30-12:40 Welcome Remarks; 12:40-1:10 Presentation 1; 1:10-1:20 Hands-on session; 1:20-1:50 Presentation 2; 1:50-2:20 Hands-on session 2; 2:20-2:30 Closing Remarks; 2:30-3:30 Reception.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Future Labs, 3 Chubb Rd, Ikot Ekpene, Akwa Ibom
events.raw_text:
Sat, Jun 17, 2023 · 12:00 PM to 3:00 PM GMT+1

Presentation #1: Starting and leveling up your career in the Data world (Ini-Abasi Affiah, Data Scientist)
Presentation #2: DBT for everyone (James Sandy, Data Engineer)

talks.description: Pointers for beginners on getting started in a data team role, plus guidance for existing data practitioners on how to level up their careers.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Presentation #1: Starting and leveling up your career in the Data world. This presentation will have two focuses, it will give beginners pointers on what it is like working in the data team
talks.title: Starting and Leveling Up Your Career in the Data World

talks.description: An introduction to dbt, how data teams around the world use it, and how to get started.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Presentation #2: DBT for everyone. This presentation will give a good introduction to DBT, how data teams all around the world are using it, and how you and your team can also get started with it.
talks.title: dbt for Everyone
